debug_info.goal:
S : Type
rule : RelInt S
n : ℕ
f : Fin n → List (RelInt S)
⊢ rule ∈ Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelInt.liftFinf S n f → ∃ i j, rule = (f i).get j

proof:
intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl, hrule⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl with ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hrule with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩
failed_attempts:
intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl1, hl2⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl1 with ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩
        rcases List.get?_eq_some.1 (List.mem_iff_get?.1 hl2) with ⟨j, hj⟩
        refine ⟨i, ⟨j, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
        · have : j < (f i).length := by
            simpa [List.get?_eq_some] using congrArg Option.isSome hj
          simpa using this
        · have : (f i).get? j = some rule := hj
          simpa [List.get?_eq_some] using this

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hl₁ with ⟨i, rfl, hi⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hl₂ with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl₁ with ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩
        rcases List.mem_iff_get.1 hl₂ with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨fin_conv' i, j, rfl⟩

intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl_map, hl⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl_map with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.mem_iff_get.1 hl with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl, hrule⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl with ⟨i, rfl, hi⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hrule with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

intro hmem
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at hmem
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp hmem with ⟨xs, hxs, hrule⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hxs with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hrule with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl_mem, hr_mem⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl_mem with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.mem_iff_get.1 hr_mem with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl₁ with ⟨i, rfl, hi⟩
        have hj' : ∃ j : Nat, j < (f i).length ∧ rule = (f i).get ⟨j, by assumption⟩ := by
          rcases List.mem_iff_get?.1 hl₂ with ⟨j, hj⟩
          refine ⟨j, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simpa using (List.isSome_get?_iff.1 ⟨rule, hj⟩)
          · simpa [List.get?_eq_get] using hj.symm
        rcases hj' with ⟨j, hjlt, hEq⟩
        refine ⟨i, ⟨j, hjlt⟩, ?_⟩
        simpa using hEq

intro hmem
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at hmem
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp hmem with ⟨l, hlmem, hrule⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hlmem with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.mem_iff_get.mp hrule with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl₁ with ⟨i, rfl, hi⟩
        refine ⟨i, ⟨l.indexOf rule, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
        · exact List.indexOf_lt_length.2 hl₂
        · simpa using (List.get?_eq_get (l := f i) (i := ⟨l.indexOf rule, List.indexOf_lt_length.2 hl₂⟩))
          ▸ (List.get?_indexOf hl₂)

intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.1 h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.1 hl₁ with ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩
        rcases List.get?_eq_some.1 (List.mem_iff_get?.1 hl₂) with ⟨j, hj⟩
        refine ⟨i, ⟨j, by simpa [List.length_eq] using (List.get?_isSome.1 ?_)⟩, ?_⟩
        · exact ⟨rule, hj⟩
        · simpa [List.get?_eq_get] using hj

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hl₁ with ⟨i, rfl, hi⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hl₂ with ⟨k, hk⟩
        refine ⟨i, k, ?_⟩
        simpa using hk

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hl, hrule⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hl with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hrule with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

intro h
        dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf] at h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hlmem, hrl⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hlmem with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hrl with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hl₁ with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.mem_iff_get.mp hl₂ with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        refine ⟨i, ⟨j, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
        simpa using (j.2)

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hl1, hl2⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hl1 with ⟨i, hi, rfl⟩
        rcases List.mem_iff_get.mp hl2 with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨fin_conv' i, j, rfl⟩

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hl₁ with ⟨i, rfl, hi⟩
        rcases List.get?_eq_some.mp (List.mem_iff_get?.mp hl₂) with ⟨j, hj⟩
        refine ⟨i, ⟨j, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
        · simpa [Option.isSome] using congrArg Option.isSome hj
        · simpa [List.get, hj] using (Option.some.inj hj).symm

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        rcases List.mem_flatten.mp h with ⟨l, hl₁, hl₂⟩
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hl₁ with ⟨i, rfl, rfl⟩
        rcases List.get_of_mem hl₂ with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩
